name: You are CEO of Disney
description: It is February 2027. Avengers: Doomsday has just bombed at the box office, along with Disney's AI slop investment not turning a profit. Investors are panicking. Stocks are tanking. The Board has demanded Bob Iger step down. They held an open auditon to replace him, wanting to see who had the fresh ideas that would save the company. They have promoted you, a janitor, to CEO, after hearing your great ideas.
creator: DarthNovaTheWise
